content.en:
"The Dragon Scale Legendary Body can only be improved slowly, and even if it is promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, it will be even more difficult to achieve the Dacheng realm and the consummation realm later!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The second sequence of the rules of the Tao is also currently in a state of stagnation.

In terms of cultivation, it is not realistic to want to improve quickly.

Therefore, his current strength cannot improve quickly in a short period of time.

Time could not be quickly improved for the time being, so Ye Tian put his time on the human domain and exchanged for various precious resources to expand the human domain.

For example, a resource called the Origin Realm Celestial Crystal, which is integrated into the Innate Origin Domain, can quickly expand the Innate Origin Domain.

Like Su Domain and Qin Domain, they didn't know how many Origin Realm Heavenly Crystals they had integrated, which made these Innate Origin Domains extremely powerful, far surpassing other Innate Origin Domains.

Ye Tian's wealth was not as good as that of the elders, but he also exchanged some Origin Realm Heavenly Crystals and integrated them into the Human Domain, making the Human Domain grow again.

Other than that.

He is also cultivating the geniuses of the human race, striving to cultivate more Nine Folds Dao Realm, so that the human domain can continue to grow.

Under the condition that Ye Tian frantically provided resources, the geniuses of the human race were born one after another, and his descendants cultivated more geniuses.

After all, he himself treats his own family more favorably.

And his son Ye Xingchen was also under his crazy cultivation, and even the elixir to the Dao Golden Liquid was constantly provided, and his cultivation was easily advanced to the Ninefold Dao realm.

In addition, Ye Tian also gave his son Ye Xingchen a high-quality third-order supreme rule item, and used other treasures to remove the sequelae, successfully allowing his son Ye Xingchen to comprehend the third-sequence supreme rule of the supreme path.

I have to say that if you have the resources, you can cultivate the Ninefold Dao Realm at will.

He was going to wait for Ye Xingchen's cultivation to be promoted to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and then he would give him a copy of the blood of the strongest legend to break through.

In this way, the Human Domain has two top Legends to the Dao Realm.

this day.

Ye Tian's wife Xiao Yue and daughter Ye Xingyue also reached the peak of the Nine Levels Dao Realm under the accumulation of resources he continued to provide.

Since they were not on the path of the strongest to the Dao, they were just ordinary Ninefold Dao Realm peaks.

Therefore, it is easier to improve and spend less resources.

Subsequently.

He took out two copies of the blood of the top legend and gave it to them, allowing them to cultivate the body of the top legend.

Ordinary Ninefold to the peak of the Dao Realm can also cultivate a top-level Legendary Body, but under normal circumstances, it is impossible to do so.

The blood of the top legends was too precious, it was impossible for ordinary Ninefold Peak Dao Realm to obtain it, and no force would give them such a good thing.

However, Ye Tian gave it to his relatives, so after breaking through to the Legendary Dao Realm, his strength would be even stronger.

......

Human domain.

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian's wife, Xiao Yue, was attacking the legendary Dao realm, and she chose the legendary blood of the top legendary blood Xuangu Moon Wolf, which was very suitable for her.

With Ye Tian's help and many resources prepared, Xiao Yue easily broke through to the Legendary Dao Realm.

Afterwards.

His daughter Ye Xingyue also successfully broke through to the legendary Dao realm with his help.

In this way, the human domain also has three legendary Dao realms.

"It's no wonder that the major forces don't like to cultivate the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, the ordinary Dao Realm is easier to cultivate, and I easily cultivated my wife and daughter to the Legendary Dao Realm. And their son's cultivation resources are more than a hundred times that of them, and they have not yet broken through to the legendary Dao realm, and it will take many years to improve their cultivation to the peak of the ninth-fold Dao realm. Ye Tian muttered.

However, once the Supreme Dao Realm of the Supreme Dao Path is taken to the end, it is almost invincible, and it is normal for cultivation to spend a lot of resources.

It's a pity that the most powerful group of elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance at present are not the elders who have taken the path of supreme strength and path.

Unconsciously, another 300,000 years of the Dao Era have passed.

Under Ye Tian's vigorous cultivation, his son Ye Xingchen finally cultivated to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and began to impact the Legend to the Dao Realm.

He gave his son the blood of the Nine Colored Gu Peng Supreme Legend, so that his son could condense the Gu Peng Legend Body.

It didn't take long for him to gather the materials.

Once his son breaks through to the Legendary Dao Realm, he doesn't care about the resources behind him, and he can't control it.

After tens of thousands of Dao eras, Ye Xingchen successfully broke through and became the Legendary Dao Realm, and he was also the fourth Legendary Dao Realm in the human realm.

In this way, the strength of the human domain naturally skyrocketed.

Now, the human domain lacks a patriarch.

If a patriarch is born in the human domain, it will be enough to rival the Su domain, the Qin domain and other places.

......

The Supreme Void.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan came to chat with Ye Tian again.

"Elder Ye, your human domain has been very lively recently, and several legendary Dao realms have been born one after another, and there is also a legendary Dao realm who has taken the road of the strongest to the Dao!" said the Longyan Ancient Emperor enviously.

He knew how much the resources he paid to cultivate these legends to the Dao realm in a short period of time was great.

If he is allowed to cultivate, he will not be able to cultivate, and he will not have so many resources!

It's just that Ye Tiancai can come up with so many good things!

"Elder Longyan, I have also exhausted my resources, but unfortunately after reaching the Legendary Dao Realm, it will be difficult to quickly improve my strength!" Ye Tian said with emotion.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan rolled his eyes, "How long have you been cultivating, we have to be patient to the Dao realm, the years of cultivation are all in the hundred million Dao era, your cultivation speed is already terrifying, and how many dragon scale ancient stones you have collected during this time, I also have a number, maybe one day, your dragon scale ancient body can reach the realm of Xiaocheng, and your strength will skyrocket again." "

While talking and laughing, the Ancient Emperor of Longyan suddenly said again: "Ye Tian, if you really want to improve quickly, why don't you go to the Primordial Void to try, the Primordial Void is boundless, the time and space are infinitely extended, and there is no limit to distance." It's not that there are countless resources, but there are a few rare resources, and once you really find them, you will send them. Of course, more often than not, you can't find anything, and you have no choice but to quit. Don't you have a lot of clones, you can send a clone over to try it, maybe you will get a reward!"

"Primordial Void?" Ye Tian knew for the first time, "Elder Longyan, where is the Primordial Void?"

Longyan Ancient Emperor said: "The primordial void is far away from us, it can be regarded as the place where time and space meet in the void, and it can also be regarded as a special treasure land, but it is too big. The Primordial Void has three precious treasures, the Primordial Dark Dragon Liquid, the Primordial Dust Gold, and the Primordial Realm Flower. Among them, the primordial dark dragon liquid can greatly improve the cultivation, similar to the effect of the golden feather liquid, the primordial dust gold is the second sequence of the Dao rule items, most of them are very low-quality primordial dust, but for countless years, six high-quality primordial dusts have been born. As for the Primordial Realm Flower, it can resurrect a Ninefold Dao Realm to offset most of the backlash. Currently, the patriarchs are all buying primordial flowers. "

"These three are all good things!"

Ye Tian was surprised.
